title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at FreeCharge - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at FreeCharge - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at FreeCharge are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About FreeCharge:
FreeCharge is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreeCharge!
